title: Veneficus Casus
description: Wizardry And Steampunk Tech, For Quilt
body:
Veneficus Casus, is a modpack aimed at giving a somewhat rounded experience to those who play
it while still offering a fantasy/steampunk world vibe to the player! 

Magic: 
With magic mods ranging from botania and spectrum, to nevermore, there is plenty of range between
fun and colourful, as well as edgy and dark magic for people to carve their own path as a wizard.

Technology: 
If magic isn't your style then the technology offered by the create mod is here to turn your adventure
into more of a steampunk quest to conquer the world with brass and iron.

Decoration:
With Plenty Of Decoration focused mods like, Adorn, Beautify, And Clutter there is plenty of ways
to build yourself a beautiful base no matter which path you take.

Exploration: 
There has been many additions to world generation and villages, as well as new structures added by 
a plethora of mods, giving you plenty to see and explore as you travel the world looking to set your roots.

The Included Mod, Farmers Respite was found on curse forge, at this link.
[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite-fabric](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite-fabric)
There its license can also be found.
